goal: Create sellable proof assets and real conversation paths for JVT's near-term service wedges.
success_metric: 5 real owner/operator conversations per week and at least 1 paid-pilot proposal path.

wedges.name: AI receptionist / voice intake
wedges.target_customer: Solo law, CPA, contractor, clinic, and home-service offices.
wedges.offer: Inbound AI intake that discloses itself, captures caller details, qualifies the request, and routes a review packet.
wedges.first_proof_asset: Public dry-run intake demo page with proof PDF, offer-specific candidate list, and paid-pilot homepage panel.
completed_actions: Created 3 synthetic demo caller scenarios.
Ran all 3 scenarios through the dry-run /api/test-intake endpoint.
Saved generated intake packets under products/Private-AI-Lab/apps/jvt-inbound-voice-agent/data/intake.
Published site/ai-receptionist-intake-demo.html as the public demo narrative.
Linked the demo from the public Services and Demo Lab sections.
Created downloadable AI receptionist proof PDF.
Built strategy/prospect-lists/ai-receptionist-intake-targets.csv.
Added a concrete paid-pilot panel to the homepage.
Created outreach/templates/ai-receptionist-paid-pilot.md.
Created dental-office dry-run scenario pack with routine, reschedule, and urgent-escalation callers.
Ran dental scenarios through the dry-run voice intake app and generated three unique intake packets.
Added a voice-agent pilot checklist for disclosure, escalation, data handling, and go-live gates.
Added a repeatable voice-agent pilot workspace generator.
Fixed intake packet filename collisions when multiple calls share the same second and company slug.
next_actions: Use the dental pilot checklist to scope the inbound request before any live phone/provider setup.
Send and monitor the proof-backed follow-up packets queued for verified public business inboxes.
Verify priority candidates before packet generation.
Define live-call setup requirements: phone provider, webhook, disclosure script, and escalation routing.
blocked_actions: The June 24 five-packet manual send was held because the configured daily sender cap had already reached 16 of 20 messages.

wedges.name: Meeting-to-action packets
wedges.target_customer: Consultants, agencies, CPA/advisory teams, and service businesses with recurring calls.
wedges.offer: Recording to transcript, summary, decisions, tasks, follow-up email, and client-ready packet.
wedges.first_proof_asset: Public synthetic transcript-to-action packet demo page with proof PDF and candidate list.
next_actions: Send and monitor the proof-backed follow-up packets queued for verified accounting/advisory prospects.
Keep building a dedicated meeting-to-action outreach wave from verified public inboxes.
Draft outreach copy around lost action items after client calls.
completed_actions: Published site/meeting-to-action-demo.html with synthetic transcript, decision, owner, and follow-up output.
Linked the demo from the public Services and Demo Lab sections.
Created downloadable meeting-to-action proof PDF.
Built strategy/prospect-lists/meeting-to-action-targets.csv.
Generated proof-backed follow-up packets for Stone & Company LLC and Atteign.

wedges.name: Workflow automation cleanup
wedges.target_customer: Small businesses doing manual email/form/sheet/CRM handoffs.
wedges.offer: Map one messy admin workflow and replace repeat copy/paste steps with reliable automations and review checkpoints.
wedges.first_proof_asset: Before/after workflow map using JVT lead -> packet -> inbox -> follow-up operations.
next_actions: Turn the workflow map into a public one-page case study.
Create an outreach variant focused on removing 5 hours/week of admin work.
Build a prospect list of businesses with visible form-based intake.
completed_actions: Created strategy/workflow-maps/jvt-lead-to-followup-flow.md.

wedges.name: Inbox and document triage
wedges.target_customer: Law, accounting, insurance, property management, and admin-heavy service businesses.
wedges.offer: Classify shared-inbox messages, extract attachment details, create task queue, and draft reviewable replies.
wedges.first_proof_asset: Public synthetic inbox triage proof page plus sanitized JVT mailbox listener case study with triage counts.
next_actions: Use the deployed public proof page in outreach to shared-inbox-heavy offices.
Create a downloadable PDF version of the inbox triage sample.
Create a fixed-scope offer for one shared inbox.
completed_actions: Created strategy/case-studies/inbox-document-triage-case-study.md.
Updated the case study with the 1,795-item mailbox triage run.
Published site/inbox-document-triage-demo.html.
Linked the inbox triage proof page from the homepage Services and Demo Lab sections.
Created downloadable site/proof-assets/inbox-document-triage-proof.pdf.

wedges.name: Document packet generator
wedges.target_customer: Law, accounting, insurance, onboarding, and advisory teams.
wedges.offer: Turn intake notes and templates into consistent review-ready packets.
wedges.first_proof_asset: Synthetic CPA onboarding packet and law-firm intake packet.
next_actions: Package examples for website or PDF download.
Define review boundary language for each vertical.
Build a prospect list of offices with visible onboarding or checklist workflows.
completed_actions: Created client-work/synthetic-examples/cpa-onboarding-packet.md.

red_lines: No autonomous legal, tax, medical, financial, or investment advice.
No outbound AI calls without opt-in/compliance review.
No prospect emails without explicit authorization.
No spending or provider signup without approval.
No crypto mining hardware purchase, miner process, live trading, or custody setup without separate approval.

speculative_revenue_tracks.name: Smart crypto mining / profitability monitor
speculative_revenue_tracks.target_customer: Internal JVT experiment first; possibly homelab operators or small offices only after a monitor proves useful.
speculative_revenue_tracks.pain: Mining hardware gets bought from hype without accounting for electricity, heat, noise, network difficulty, taxes, and payback.
speculative_revenue_tracks.offer: Read-only mining feasibility dashboard with hardware watchlist, power-rate calculator, profitability feed, breakeven/payback model, and alerts.
speculative_revenue_tracks.pricing_hypothesis: Internal only for now; if productized, $99 setup plus $10-$25/mo hobbyist monitoring.
speculative_revenue_tracks.delivery_complexity: Medium for dashboard and alerts; high for actual mining operations, power, cooling, and hardware uptime.
speculative_revenue_tracks.next_validation_step: Build a read-only calculator using current hardware, local power assumptions, and live profitability sources before considering any hardware or mining process.
